items.title: PFC, REC say merger transition smooth; merged firm to have 20% exposure cap
items.description: Power financiers say post-merger single-entity exposure limit will be 20%, expect adequate headroom for borrowings and smooth transition

items.title: New consumer inflation data to bolster policy responses: CEA Nageswaran
